hero.subtitle: Seafront cocktail bar & coffee bar
hero.headline: The rhythm of the sea, coffee, and cocktails
hero.description: Nautica is a seafront cocktail bar and coffee bar in Tribunj where the rhythm of the sea, coffee, and cocktails carries the day from morning coffee to golden hour drinks and late seaside evenings.

brand.tagline: The sea in the glass, calm in the view
brand.intro: Right on the waterfront in Tribunj, Nautica brings together the rhythm of the sea, coffee, and cocktails in one elegant flow. People arrive for the view, stay for the atmosphere, and return for the feeling that every hour lands exactly as it should.

experiences.title: Moments to remember
experiences.subtitle: Every part of the day at Nautica carries its own character

morning.title: Morning coffee
morning.description: Start your day with espresso and a view of the calm morning sea.

sunset.title: Sunset cocktails
sunset.description: Watch the sun sink into the sea with our signature cocktails.

evening.title: Evening delight
evening.description: Music, atmosphere and company under the stars.

events_section.title: Upcoming events
events_section.subtitle: Exclusive evenings, live music and special moments

reservation_cta.title: Reserve your moment
reservation_cta.description: Secure the best seat for an unforgettable experience by the sea.

social_live.title: {{handle}} in motion and in real time.
social_live.description: A live Instagram surface paired with the venue’s Facebook timeline, shaped to feel editorial instead of generic.
social_live.caption_fallback: Follow the venue for the latest atmosphere, sunsets, and terrace moments.
social_live.facebook_title: The page stays readable without leaving the Nautica atmosphere.
social_live.facebook_body: Recent posts, announcements, and public activity are visible directly inside the homepage through the official Facebook page plugin.

cookie_consent.title: We only use what the website actually needs, and you decide the rest.
cookie_consent.body: Necessary technologies stay active for site operation, security, and forms you choose to submit. Analytics and external content such as Google Maps or Facebook widgets load only after your consent.

cookie_settings.title: Choose what the website may load.
cookie_settings.description: The necessary category stays active because the site and administration cannot work correctly without it. The remaining categories are optional and remain under your control.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.body: Security, admin sign-in, storing your cookie choice, and technical flows required for the site to work.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: Remembering the selected language, dismissed notices, and similar local settings that improve the experience but are not required for basic operation.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Basic performance metrics used to understand speed, stability, and quality of the public website.

marketing.title: External content
marketing.body: Google Maps, the Facebook timeline, and other embedded third-party services that may set their own cookies.

about.hero_subtitle: A seafront cocktail bar and coffee bar in Tribunj
about.story_p1: Nautica was shaped by a love of the sea, excellent coffee, and evenings with the right sense of measure. On the Tribunj waterfront, we build a place where the view, service, music, and the glass work together instead of competing for attention.
about.story_p2: Every detail, from the first morning coffee to the signature cocktail at golden hour, follows the same idea: refined, warm, and memorable enough to make you want to return.
about.philosophy_text: We believe luxury is not about excess, but about the right moment: coffee as the promenade wakes up, a cocktail while the sun lowers, and an evening that stays light yet unforgettable.

menu_page.title: Menu
menu_page.subtitle: Signature cocktails, curated coffee, and a Mediterranean rhythm on the Tribunj waterfront.

events_page.title: Events
events_page.subtitle: Sunset sessions, DJ nights, and special events by the sea in Tribunj.
events_page.hero_title: Events deserve their own rhythm, not just a date.
events_page.overview_description: The featured view, monthly calendar, and linear schedule all run from the same content model.

reservation_page.title: Reservation
reservation_page.subtitle: Reserve a table at Nautica, the seafront cocktail bar and coffee bar in Tribunj.
reservation_page.hero_title: Reserve an evening by the sea without a generic booking flow.

confirmation.title: Confirmed without uncertainty
confirmation.body: Every request enters the venue’s real operational workflow.

availability.title: Real slots and availability
availability.body: Time, capacity, and closures are checked before confirmation.

areas.title: An area matched to the evening
areas.body: Terrace, bar, and more intimate corners all feed the same refined flow.

reservation_page.success_body: Our team will confirm the details by phone or email. If the evening includes an event or a special area, the confirmation will reflect real availability.
reservation_page.table_title: A precise flow for arrival, timing, and the tone of the evening.

process_points.one: Your request enters the real operational system, not a generic inbox.
process_points.two: Capacity and special schedules are checked before confirmation.
process_points.three: Event and VIP reservations stay linked to real nights and real areas.

form.name: Full name
form.notes_placeholder: Special request, event evening, or VIP note.
form.consent: I agree to the reservation terms and privacy policy.
form.success: Reservation received! We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

media_page.title: Media
media_page.subtitle: Frames of the sea, sunsets, and evenings that define Nautica in Tribunj.
media_page.hero_title: The Nautica atmosphere lives both inside the frame and beyond it.

faq_page.title: FAQ
faq_page.subtitle: Clear answers for reservations, events, and private inquiries before your visit to Nautica in Tribunj.
faq_page.hero_title: The essentials should feel as considered as the venue itself.
faq_page.quick_whatsapp: WhatsApp remains the fastest path for anything specific.
faq_page.section_title: Useful answers, organized with the same calm as the rest of the experience.
faq_page.section_body: Reservations, event access, venue details, and private inquiries sit in one refined reference point instead of getting lost in direct messages.
faq_page.cta_title: Move from answers to action without leaving the atmosphere behind.
faq_page.cta_body: If the answer is not here, continue directly into WhatsApp or start a reservation request with the right context already in place.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.subtitle: Get in touch
contact_page.hero_title: Get in touch without losing the atmosphere.
contact_page.send_note_title: The request can be quick without the experience becoming generic.
contact_page.success_title: Your message is on its way.
contact_page.success_body: We will come back with a clear answer by email or phone as soon as the venue team reviews the request.

form.name: Your name
form.message_placeholder: Ask about private events, terrace seating, or anything that helps shape the visit.

about_page.story_intro_title: Nautica was never imagined as just another venue by the sea, but as a place you return to for the feeling.

values.horizon_title: A horizon that sets the pace
values.hospitality_body: Service stays warm, clear, and intentionally unforced.

menu_book.cover_body: An edition for slower evenings, signature cocktails, and mornings that stay light.
menu_book.editorial_body: The chapters turn like a small evening book. Tap, swipe, or jump directly to the section you want.

menu_page_experience.hero_title: The menu is now an edition, not an ordinary list.
menu_page_experience.hero_description: Chapters, pacing, and page turning now guide drinks and bites the same way on mobile and desktop.
menu_page_experience.aside_card_one_body: The mobile view keeps the book metaphor instead of falling back to generic cards.
menu_page_experience.aside_card_two_body: One data source, one premium narrative for the menu.

read_steps.one: Use the chapters to jump to coffee, cocktails, wines, or bites.
read_steps.two: On desktop, the pages turn like a small evening menu book.
read_steps.three: On mobile, the experience stays touch-first, fast, and legible.

menu_page_experience.signature_title: The flavours stay organized, but now they have presence.
menu_page_experience.signature_body: The menu no longer changes its character based on device. One editorial logic carries the experience from the first chapter to the last page.

home_page.signature_sequence_title: From the first coffee to the last look at the sea, the day here moves with quiet elegance.

one.title: First coffee by the water
one.body: Morning starts with quiet service, precise coffee, and a clear horizon.

two.title: Aperitivo in the golden hour
two.body: Cocktails and the sea move in the same tempo before sunset.

three.title: An evening built to linger
three.body: Programming, music, and company turn the night into something memorable.

home_page.atmosphere_title: Light, sea, and music never feel separate here.
home_page.atmosphere_body: Morning stays fresh, golden hour turns soft, and the night carries warmth. Nautica leaves an impression through rhythm, not noise.
home_page.menu_title: Browse it like a small evening edition.
home_page.menu_body: Coffee, signature cocktails, spritzes, wine, and carefully chosen drinks unfold through a menu designed to feel like a refined seaside edition.
home_page.media_title: The venue now holds both still frames and moving moments.
home_page.media_body: Photos, short videos, and GIF scenes from the interior, terrace, and sunsets keep the venue’s rhythm in view.
home_page.reservation_title: Reserve a table by the sea for coffee, aperitivo, or an evening that runs longer than planned.
home_page.reservation_body: On the Tribunj waterfront, reservations lead you toward the right table, the right timing, and the view that sets half the mood. Clear, refined, and never generic.

event_detail.reservation_title: Your place is confirmed through the event reservation flow.
event_detail.reservation_interest_title: Send your interest for this evening.
